output: Selected apps/codex-proxy/src/server.ts and schemas.ts for HTTP/auth mapping, env.ts for redacted config, and packages/codex provider contracts only when the shared API changes.
Routed deployment, auth rotation, incident, and rollback procedures to future apps/codex-proxy/runbooks under HGI-303, authority to HGI-304, and hosted proof to HGI-305.
Separated local mock/smoke verification from explicitly authorized Preview proof and separately authorized Production proof.
limitations: A clean-clone focused proxy test requires its package dependency to be built first; this is a setup limitation, not auth proof.
nonClaims: Source and local tests do not establish token validity, deployment identity, provider reachability, or credential-rotation authority.
